Chemotherapy (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received chemotherapy in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
954 CHMTHRPY_INTRVNS_ADMSN_CD CHMTHRPY_INTRVNS_ADMSN_CD O0110A2A Treatment: Chemo - IV (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received IV chemotherapy days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
